title: thalictrum minus subsp. buschianum
intro: Thalictrum minus subsp. buschianum, also known as small meadow rue, is a perennial plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Thalictrum minus subsp. buschianum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
